The '''Inchichtok''' were a [[Speciesism|xenophobic]] [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="SWGK" /> Around [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Kit]]'' establishes that the [[Terr'skiar Pass]] was considered "newly discovered" at the time [[Arnoth Draenell]] encountered the Inchichtok. As ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' establishes that the Terr'skiar Pass was discovered around [[200 BBY/Legends|200 BBY]], the [[Species/Legends|species]] must have been discovered around that [[Standard year/Legends|year]].</ref> the Inchichtok had their first contact with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], meeting the [[Scout/Legends|scout]] expedition [[Commander/Legends|commander]] [[Arnoth Draenell]] and his [[Arnoth Draenell's crew|crew]] in an unscouted [[Star system/Legends|star system]] that later became known as the [[Bissillirus system/Legends|Bissillirus system]]<ref name="SWGK" /> in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}}</ref> Though Draenell's crew attempted to continue their expedition, the Inchichtok prevented them from doing so by [[Death/Legends|ending]] their lives.<ref name="SWGK" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Inchichtok were first introduced in the [[1991]] [[roleplaying game]] sourcebook ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Kit]]'', which was written by [[Bill Smith]] and [[Ed Stark]] and published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="SWGK" />
